Klasse Order

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Order
public class Order extends Object
Represents an order with sender/receiver details and ordered article quantities.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Order(String orderId, Map<String,Integer> orderedArticles, String receiverName, String receiverKontoNumber, String orderDate, String senderName, String senderKontoNumber, String department)
    Creates a new order with default status "In Bearbeitung".
    Order(String orderId, Map<String,Integer> orderedArticles, String receiverName, String receiverKontoNumber, String orderDate, String senderName, String senderKontoNumber, String department, String status)
    Creates a new order with an explicit status.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Order

      public Order(String orderId, Map<String,Integer> orderedArticles, String receiverName, String receiverKontoNumber, String orderDate, String senderName, String senderKontoNumber, String department)
      Creates a new order with default status "In Bearbeitung".
      Parameter:
      orderId - unique order identifier
      orderedArticles - map of articleNumber to quantity
      receiverName - receiver name
      receiverKontoNumber - receiver account number
      orderDate - order date text
      senderName - sender name
      senderKontoNumber - sender account number
      department - department name

    • Order

      public Order(String orderId, Map<String,Integer> orderedArticles, String receiverName, String receiverKontoNumber, String orderDate, String senderName, String senderKontoNumber, String department, String status)
      Creates a new order with an explicit status.
      Parameter:
      orderId - unique order identifier
      orderedArticles - map of articleNumber to quantity
      receiverName - receiver name
      receiverKontoNumber - receiver account number
      orderDate - order date text
      senderName - sender name
      senderKontoNumber - sender account number
      department - department name
      status - order status label

    • getTotalOrderPrice

      public double getTotalOrderPrice()
      Calculates the total sales price for all ordered articles.
      Gibt zurück:
      total price based on sell price per article
